title: Nutty Juicy Egyptian Almond Stir-fry
description: This meal-prep diabetic-friendly egyptian dish features naan bread and almonds cooked in a healthy sauté to provide crunch and flavor.
instructions: Toast the naan bread in the preheated oven for about 2 minutes or until lightly golden and crispy on both sides.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the onions and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute. Stir in the turmeric powder and cumin seeds, cooking for another 30 seconds to allow flavors to meld.
Pour in the tomato paste and soy sauce, stirring continuously to prevent burning. Let it reduce slightly for a minute.
Fold in the almonds and toasted naan bread pieces. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the mixture is heated through.
Sprinkle with chili flakes if desired, then serve hot.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
